acmpca.certificate.customattribute.CfnAb: Defines the X.500 relative distinguished name (RDN).

acmpca.certificate.customattribute.Objec.Description: Specifies the object identifier (OID) of the attribute type of the relative distinguished name (RDN).

acmpca.certificate.customattribute.Value.Description: Specifies the attribute value of relative distinguished name (RDN).
